title: Fine-Tune Metric Wizard Merge Workflow
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the metric merge workflow to be refined based on real-world feedback, so that merging is intuitive and produces correct results.
description: Follow-on enhancements to the Metric Wizard merge workflow (MBT-670) based on learnings from initial usage. Fine-tuning includes UX adjustments and logic improvements discovered during testing and customer feedback. Implemented as part of MBT-670.
acceptance_criteria: User experience improvements based on real-world usage
ux_changes: Merge workflow UI refinements based on real-world feedback and testing.
middleware_changes: Merge logic adjustments based on observed edge cases.
comment_summary: Developer noted changes were implemented in the MBT-670 ticket.
